package handler

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type CreateOrderDTO struct {
	ID          string  `json:"id" binding:"required"`
	CustomerName string `json:"customer_name" binding:"required"`
	Email       string  `json:"email" binding:"required,email"`
	ProductID   string  `json:"product_id" binding:"required"`
	Quantity    int     `json:"quantity" binding:"required,min=1"`
	TotalAmount float64 `json:"total_amount" binding:"required,gt=0"`
	ShippingAddr string `json:"shipping_address" binding:"required"`
}

func CreateOrderHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var dto CreateOrderDTO
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&dto); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	if dto.ID == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "id is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.CustomerName == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "customer_name is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.Email == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "email is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.ProductID == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "product_id is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.Quantity < 1 {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "quantity must be at least 1"})
		return
	}
	if dto.TotalAmount <= 0 {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "total_amount must be greater than 0"})
		return
	}
	if dto.ShippingAddr == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "shipping_address is required"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"message": "order created", "order": dto})
}

func UpdateOrderHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	var dto CreateOrderDTO
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&dto); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	if dto.ID == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "order id is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.CustomerName == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "customer name is required"})
		return
	}
	if dto.Email == "" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "email is required"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "order updated"})
}
